purpose: Converts command-line args (passed through from AppCli) into a URL query string for the embedded web app.
invariants: Last value wins for duplicate keys
Bool keys (camera, volumetric, etc.) are normalized: 1/y/yes/on→true, 0/n/no/off→false
A single argument starting with '?' is accepted as a raw query string and passed through as-is
gotchas: Unknown keys without a value are silently dropped (with a Debug.WriteLine warning) rather than passed through as empty-value params
BoolKeys uses FrozenSet for O(1) lookup — key membership determines whether a value-less flag gets value='true' or gets dropped
